title: [FIRRTL] Regression in SystemVerilog signal naming with layers

features.name: named wire with complex expression degraded to layer_probe
features.description: Code should include a named wire with a meaningful identifier that is assigned a complex expression involving multiple signals and reduction operators

features.name: layer_probe signal replacing original signal name
features.description: Code should include a wire named _layer_probe that replaces a previously named signal when layers are introduced in the design

features.name: hierarchical signal reference from layer module
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical reference to a signal in another module, such as Foo._layer_probe used in a layer verification module
